mapper.sql: SELECT g.id, g.category_id, c.name AS category_name, g.name, g.min_players, g.max_players, g.play_time, g.is_active, g.image_url, MAX(CASE WHEN m.price = 0 AND m.is_deleted = FALSE THEN m.description END) AS description, COUNT(CASE WHEN gi.status = 'NORMAL' THEN 1 END) AS game_item_count FROM game g LEFT JOIN category c ON g.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN menu m ON m.name = g.name AND m.price = 0 AND m.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN game_item gi ON g.id = gi.game_id
mapper.select: GROUP BY g.id, g.category_id, c.name, g.name, g.min_players, g.max_players, g.play_time, g.is_active ORDER BY g.category_id, g.id
WHERE g.category_id = #{categoryId} GROUP BY g.id, g.category_id, c.name, g.name, g.min_players, g.max_players, g.play_time, g.is_active ORDER BY g.id
WHERE g.is_active = #{isActive} GROUP BY g.id, g.category_id, c.name, g.name, g.min_players, g.max_players, g.play_time, g.is_active ORDER BY g.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game (category_id, name, min_players, max_players, play_time, is_active, image_url) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{minPlayers}, #{maxPlayers}, #{playTime}, #{isActive}, #{imageUrl})
mapper.update: UPDATE game SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, min_players = #{minPlayers}, max_players = #{maxPlayers}, play_time = #{playTime}, is_active = #{isActive}, image_url = #{imageUrl} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: GROUP BY g.id, g.category_id, c.name, g.name, g.min_players, g.max_players, g.play_time, g.is_active ORDER BY g.category_id, g.id LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{skip}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
